attributes.action: Ban alcohol at Westminster and at all other government workplaces
attributes.additional_details: Recent behaviour of MPs at PMQs shows why a total ban of alcohol is needed at Westminster. Alcohol is a dangerous drug that continues to cause major social harm, domestic violence and strain on the NHS. Dispensing such a drug at any workplace is irresponsible and unacceptable.
attributes.background: Ban all alcohol consumption at Westminster and other government premises. No exceptions.

rejection.details:
We think this petition is very similar to yours: 

Ban the sale and consumption of alcohol in House of Commons venues: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768417
